name: Quadro Resources Ltd.
summary: Quadro Resources Ltd. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company holds a 100% interest in the Staghorn gold property that consists of 160 claim units covering 4000 hectares; a 100% interest in the Costigan Lake property; and an option to acquire a 100% interest in Long Lake property comprising 272 claim units covering 6800 hectares located in Newfoundland. It also holds an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Yellow Fox and Careless Cove properties covering 40 claim units situated in Newfoundland; and an option to acquire a 70% interest in the Seagull Lake property, which hosts platinum group metals comprising 492 single cell mining claims totaling 10,390 hectares located in Thunder Bay, Ontario. The company was formerly known as Tri-Gold Resources Corp. and changed its name to Quadro Resources Ltd. in May 2009. Quadro Resources Ltd. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
